name: radioflow-studio
description: Plataforma integral de automatización y gestión radial (multiplataforma + IA semántica)

scripts.dev:auto: concurrently -n api,web,enc,sched -c blue,magenta,green,yellow "npm run dev -w @radioflow/api" "npm run dev -w @radioflow/web" "npm run dev -w @radioflow/encoder" "npm run dev -w @radioflow/schedule-worker"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -n api,web,enc -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev -w @radioflow/api" "npm run dev -w @radioflow/web" "npm run dev -w @radioflow/encoder"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @radioflow/shared && npm run build -w @radioflow/api && npm run build -w @radioflow/web
scripts.build:installer: npm run icons:desktop && npm run build -w @radioflow/shared && npm run build -w @radioflow/api && node scripts/stage-api-for-desktop.mjs && cross-env VITE_LOCAL_DEFAULT_EMAIL= VITE_LOCAL_DEFAULT_PASSWORD= npm run build:desktop -w @radioflow/web && npm run dist:win -w @radioflow/desktop
scripts.build:desktop:run: npm run build -w @radioflow/shared && npm run build -w @radioflow/api && node scripts/stage-api-for-desktop.mjs && cross-env VITE_LOCAL_DEFAULT_EMAIL= VITE_LOCAL_DEFAULT_PASSWORD= npm run build:desktop -w @radioflow/web && node scripts/desktop-electron-pack.mjs --win --launch
scripts.build:desktop:all: npm run build -w @radioflow/shared && npm run build -w @radioflow/api && node scripts/stage-api-for-desktop.mjs && cross-env VITE_LOCAL_DEFAULT_EMAIL= VITE_LOCAL_DEFAULT_PASSWORD= npm run build:desktop -w @radioflow/web && npm run dist -w @radioflow/desktop
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -k -n web,desk -c magenta,cyan "cross-env VITE_HASH_ROUTER=true VITE_EMBEDDED_STANDALONE=true npm run dev -w @radioflow/web" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env RADIOFLOW_DEV=1 npm run dev:electron-only -w @radioflow/desktop"
scripts.dev:desktop:embedded: concurrently -k -n api,web,desk -c blue,magenta,cyan "cross-env DATABASE_URL=file:./.data/radioflow-dev-embedded.db JWT_SECRET=desarrollo-cambiar-minimo-32-chars-embedded-x EMBEDDED_STANDALONE=1 API_BACKGROUND_MODE=full LIBRARY_PROCESS_WORKER_POLL_MS=2500 CUE_DETECT_BACKFILL_ENABLED=1 AUDIO_FFMPEG_ENABLED=1 AUDIO_FFPROBE_ENABLED=1 INTERNAL_SCHEDULE_POLL_MS=60000 SCHEDULER_EVENTS_POLL_MS=2000 PORT=4100 CORS_ORIGIN=http://127.0.0.1:5173,http://localhost:5173 npm run dev -w @radioflow/api" "cross-env VITE_HASH_ROUTER=true VITE_EMBEDDED_STANDALONE=true VITE_API_ORIGIN=http://127.0.0.1:4100 npm run dev -w @radioflow/web" "wait-on -t 120000 tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 http-get://127.0.0.1:4100/api/auth/setup-status && cross-env RADIOFLOW_DEV=1 npm run dev:electron-only -w @radioflow/desktop"
scripts.docker:workers: docker compose --profile workers up -d schedule-worker library-process-worker
scripts.pgvector:backfill: npm run build -w @radioflow/api && npm run pgvector:backfill -w @radioflow/api
scripts.test:unit: npm run test -w @radioflow/api && npm run test -w @radioflow/encoder && npm run test -w @radioflow/web
